title: Battle of Kolaador

A '''battle''' occurred between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kolaador]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The world was home to an Alliance [[Kolaador Base|Pilot Training Center]] as early as [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], having trained notable [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Rookie One]], who also participated in the defense of the planet.

==Prelude==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kolaador]], located in the [[Kolaador system/Legends|Kolaador system]]<ref name="Rebel Assault">''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]''</ref> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> was a rocky world, with a number of canyons filled with [[Crystal/Legends|crystalline]] spires. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] established a [[Kolaador Base|Pilot Training Center]] on the planet prior to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], using these canyons as challenging training runs for their [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. Among those trained at the facility was [[Rookie One]].<ref name="Rebel Assault" />

==The battle==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Galactic Empire attacked Kolaador, with a force led by three [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. Deploying both [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], the Imperials engaged Rebel forces consisting of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfights]] among the planet's crystal canyons. Among the Rebel forces defending the base, was Kolaador graduate, Rookie One, flying an X-wing.<ref name="Topps" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|This exciting painting, used for the product's packaging, shows Rookie One's point of view while flying through crystalline rock formations on the planet Kolaador as TIE fighters fire from above.|Backing of [[Topps]] card|<ref name="Topps" />}}
This battle is based on the box cover art for ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'', a [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] released in [[1993]],<ref name="Topps" /> which was reused for the ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide|Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide]]''.<ref name="Guide">''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide]]''</ref> The artwork by [[Greg Winters]] depicted a battle on the planet Kolaador,<ref name="Topps" /> even though no such battle occurred in the game itself; Kolaador was only used for a training mission, with no combat involved.<ref name="Rebel Assault" /> This artwork was later reused by [[Topps]] in their ''[[1995 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 3]]'' set of trading cards, released in [[1995]]. The card had an accompanying description on its back specifying Rookie One's involvement, as well as reinforcing the event within the Legends timeline. There is, however, no indication of the chronological placement of the battle, except that it must be after Rookie One's training there.<ref name="Topps" />

[[LucasArts Update|''Excerpts from the Journal of a Rebel Pilot'']] mentions Rookie One being back in the same bar of Kolaador Rebel base three years later, long after [[Anchorhead Base]] was destroyed.<ref name="Insider27">{{InsiderCite|27|LucasArts Update|Excerpts from the Journal of a Rebel Pilot}}</ref> This visit may be linked to the above-mentioned battle, linking it to the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].
